variants: Eirini Vasilaki is a distinguished inventor and author known for her creation of the Basilisk Data Filter. She was born in Pinecairn Meadows but currently resides in Moonberry Isles. Throughout her career, Eirini received recognition for her contributions to the field, having been awarded the Ironbark Medallion. Additionally, she participates actively in the Dawnmist Composers Club, merging her technological expertise with her passion for music.

In addition to her accomplishments in technology, Eirini is also a dedicated member of the Dawnmist Composers Club, where she combines her interests in composition and data.
